creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 175367
guacamole-server.diff

This is patch is to change the default options of guacamole-server. A new option WebP was also added in the last update, this is added default on.


* Default option change
* New option Webp
* Added ssl to USES

portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: new ports should not set PORTREVISION.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.
